programme.desc: When a new Xingo app mysteriously appears on Gwen's tablet, Ben can't help himself and activates it despite his cousin's disapproval, springing a trap that transports Ben in the animated world and Xingo back in the real world. It's the ol' switcheroo!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Forever Knight finally assembles his Round Table of young but super-powerful Knights, including-- Ben?! With Ben's help, Forever Knight leads his new minions in an all-out attack on a Particle Accelerator - his true intention to transform it into a Time Machine and conquer history!

programme.desc: A fishing boat captain's peaceful life shattered as his ex-wife begs for his help- asking him to kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China 3
programme.desc: Master Wong and his disciples enroll in the 'Dancing Lion Competition' to stop an assassination plot and to battle an arrogant, deceitful opponent.

programme.title: Guimoon: The Lightless Door
programme.desc: A renowned paranormal investigator explores an abandoned training center where a custodian murdered all of the guests in 1990. Joined by three college students aiming for the money prize of a video competition , he uncovers a buried secrets.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

programme.title: The Limit
programme.desc: Police Officer So-Eun takes part in the investigation and acts as stand-in for a kidnapped child's mother. So-Eun receives a shocking phone call, her son was olso kidnapped by the same group.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman follows a lead to find his missing brother, he dives headlong into a twisted underworld of squatters and vagrants that threatens to tear apart his family as he struggles to maintain his sanity.

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign of Chaos
programme.desc: After a group of criminals manage to escape while being transported, the police decided to regroup a special team which consists of prisoners to help track and return them to prison.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: Journey from the fashion capital to Milan, across the great canals of Venice to the otherworldly peaks of the Dolomites and the colorful coast of Cinque Terre to discover Northern Italy like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Ainsley Eats The Streets
programme.desc: Ainsley discovers that Madrid is a city of secrets. The first one comes as a bit of a shock: street food is banned in this food-obsessed city. So how do the locals get round this?

programme.title: Ainsley Eats The Streets
programme.desc: Ainsley lands in Morocco, but he doesn't go to Marrakesch or Casablanca, but to the colourful, chaotic and dreamy city of Fes. The sprawling medina is a World Heritage site and a gateway to another time.

programme.title: Ainsley Eats The Streets
programme.desc: Ainsley visits Georgetown, the capital of Penang island, where Malaysians come to discover the best street food in this food-obsessed country.

programme.title: Ainsley Eats The Streets
programme.desc: On the final leg of his culinary journey, Ainsley visits Amman in Jordan, the crossroads in the Middle East that families from Iraq, Lebanon, Palestine and Syria now call home.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren commences his second Food Trail of South Africa in the world famous Kruger National Park and surrounds.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Johannesburg - the gateway city to exploring South Africa! In this episode Warren indulges in the vibrant international flavours and surrounds of the Sandton neighbourhood, loved by locals and visitors alike.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: In the Atlantic's far north, autumn is the season of gales, cooling temperatures and driving rain. This is when the wildlife must make the final preparations for winter or migrate to warmer climes.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: Islands Of Creation
programme.desc: In the jungles of a remote archipelago in the South Pacific, a biologist is attempting to do something Charles Darwin and Ernst Mayr never accomplished: catch evolution in the act of creating new species. Albert Uy is on the verge of an amazing discovery in the Solomon Islands, but there's a threat looming on the horizon.

programme.title: Around The World With Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how stricter rules and public mistrust inspired 1970s advertisers to create some of history's greatest campaigns.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men Of Advertising
programme.desc: See how advertisers used a new optimism and new technology to sell big in the "Greed is Good" era.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Examine the 2002 sniper attacks in Washington D.C. through police audio and video, as well as local and national news reports. The sniper’s three-week reign of terror triggered one of the most intense and complicated manhunts in American history.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: See the meteoric rise and tragic end of civil rights activist Malcolm X, captured by rarely seen archival footage.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Witness the story of President Clinton's impeachment, presented through archival footage of the day.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Tim Ellis. A young CEO, Tim is the founder of Relativity Space, the company that built and launched the world’s first 3D printed rocket.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard are given unprecedented access to one of the world’s most guarded artworks: James Turrell’s Roden Crater. Inside the volcanic crater, the art explores the use of light and the cosmos.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Omar Bailey, a shoe designer revolutionizing sneaker culture. Omar’s FCTRY LAb has created innovative shoes for musicians and athletes. Now, he’ll create a boot inspired by ARCH.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: Spike Lee has always been a controversial and political filmmaker whose films speak for themselves. Over 40 years since his debut in the world of film, Spike continues to push boundaries in America.

programme.title: Kamala Harris: The Next President
programme.desc: This documentary explores Kamala Harris's rise from her early life in California to becoming the first female Vice President of the United States, her impact on American politics, and her potential path to becoming the first female President.

programme.title: Clint Eastwood: Make My Day
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood, Actor, director and philanthropist. From being the quintessential western icon, to honing his artistic skills and caring persona. This is his magnificent story.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: Journey from the fashion capital to Milan, across the great canals of Venice to the otherworldly peaks of the Dolomites and the colorful coast of Cinque Terre to discover Northern Italy like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: They come in all shapes and sizes, are home to terrifying volcanoes, magnificent ancient civilizations, and some of the bluest waters on Earth. These are the fascinating worlds of Italy's Islands.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Templetons head to a new family restaurant only to run into Bootsy Calico!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Baby Corp babies start aging, panic hits the office and the babies set out to find out if someone has been tainting the formula

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux builds a garage where the Reptools can be safe, but D-Structs tries to thwart their efforts by pitting them against one another.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty Rux leads the Dinotrux on a nighttime raid to rescue Ton-Ton who's been snatched by a pack of Scraptors and taken to their hive in Scraptor Valley.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: A near-accident gives Chet his first adrenaline rush, and in his quest for another he enters a dangerous race inside a pinball machine. // The FAST team must work together to keep a group of sewer surfing roaches from entering the taco stand so that Tito can pass his health inspection.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The FAST crew is tricked into going to Africa by the Queen of the Banana Slugs for a dangerous journey through the plains in order to save her tribe. // White Shadow is challenged by three over-zealous and over-sized championship sumo wrestler snails to an outrageous wrestling match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: The Reflesherator When Professor Burns requires a substitute teacher, Flyboy's dad volunteers for the job. Master Blister The students of Scare School are thrilled after a prank played on Alder and Dash results in their firing.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Casper, the Match Maker When Frankengymteacher gets extra crabby, the kids realize he's secretly in love with their history teacher, Hedy. Jimmy Bradley: Creature Catcher On “take your kid to work day,” Jimmy's dad invites him to tag along as a junior ghost catcher.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves. / When Marcus and Harper team-up for a school project, they decide to bake something ("It's like inventing, but with food!"), only to come across multiple baking misshaps (and happy accidents) along the way that the Dew Drops must secretly assist them with.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at “Hide & Seek” so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY’s Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. When his behavior ends up hurting Marty’s feelings, Alex comes to learn that the only team that matters is the one that’s made up of his friends.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. Kelp tells his family he’s a unicorn. / Kelp returns to Unicorn Land where he meets Pixie and Juniper, who show him around and introduce him to unicorn spark and magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: In preparation for the big race to determine the next Race Cadets, Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to build their own cars. The catch? The car parts are scattered throughout Pawston. \ The Not Yet Cadets compete in the final race to see which team will join the Race Cadets.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to do something special for her Mom and Paw’s anniversary, so she recreates the boat cruise where her parents first met. \ Tag discovers that nothing is planned for Pawston’s 100th birthday, so she decides the town needs to rebuild the old Bonestand for a big Pawston concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro, Burple and Cutter are left alone in the roost to care for some dragon eggs, but a trio of tricky Slinkwings want those eggs for themselves.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Cutter gets a chance to be a "mom" when a newly hatched dragon bonds with him, and they'll both be needed to get the others out of a tangled mess.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Shelby, Peabody & Sherman's biggest fan, accidentally gets sucked into the show; Queen Isabella falls for a scam and loses all her money.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers; Puss must help her learn how to control her newfound strength.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Fired from Baby Corp and trying to build their own business, Boss Baby and Tina waste all their startup funds immediately, requiring a loan from Banker Baby Benny. In order to receive their seed money and get their company rolling, they have to rebuild the town’s faith in a baby who made everyone miss a huge sporting even (and they have to do it on a very limited budget)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Unable to land baby clients, Boss and Tina take in a naughty little puppy as a side hustle, trying to earn a little extra scrap. But once they discover the dogs in the neighborhood are stealing for a puppy trainer named Becker, the mission gets much bigger, and our team is forced to earn a little Puppy Love for once.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Lured into an empty hotel where a baby has supposedly gone missing, the team is trapped by Crispin Biscuits, a chaotic British schoolboy baby who’s been hired to wreck Boss and Tina’s lives. Crispin puts the new company’s loyalty to a test in a series of fiendish puzzling mind games, all with the threat of constant balloon popping (horrible for baby ears!)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: Meteor Part 1
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: Twin Dragons

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Dante's Peak

programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in a dystopian 2050, two detectives investigate a string of mysterious murders in a world choked by pollution and pandemics. They soon discover a sinister cult and a deadly ninja assassin behind the carnage, forcing them into a desperate battle to save what remains of society.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: A Good Deal
programme.desc: Kidnapped by a desperate couple, businessman Burks Hill is forced on a frantic journey to Los Angeles. As danger mounts, the three travellers discover that they each harbour deadly secrets. What began as a simple kidnapping spirals into a lethal game where no one's plan will survive.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While visiting family at the beach, Theresa surprises a long-time friend with a reading, and reunites him with his deceased parents. In the end, Theresa returns home to find Victoria has yet to move out.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat To My Family
programme.desc: When Ryan's sister, Serena, escapes from a dangerous cult, she seeks refuge with his family to rebuild her life. Ryan's wife, Marielle, is suspicious of Serena and doesn't believe she's truly reformed.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When Theresa headlines a fundraiser to fill the Wish Room at a local center for sick children, lives are changed forever. Channeling a young girl for her grieving mom, Theresa calls the woman's family.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Lance's notoriously big bump, which halted his rap dreams. Shelby has lost control of her sweet tooth, her health and the mystery bumps she has developed.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Aussie Rock legend Jimmy Barnes and wife Jane set this season’s first mystery box, inspiring the Top 24 competitors with seasonal ingredients they love to cook with from their garden.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sautéed sweet onions, jalapeño peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.title: Living with My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Aussie Rock legend Jimmy Barnes and wife Jane set this season’s first mystery box, inspiring the Top 24 competitors with seasonal ingredients they love to cook with from their garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Andy, Poh and Jean-Christophe don their aprons and become the cooks in today’s challenge, with the Semi-finalists taking the place of the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's the Semi Final and the Top 3 MasterChef contestants face a mammoth, three-course service challenge. Only two will make it through to the Grand Finale.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's the Grand Finale where two titans of the kitchen will battle it out to be crowned the Series 17 MasterChef Australia Back to Win champion, hold up that trophy and win $250,000.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.desc: Throughout civilisation there are many mighty empires that have risen, only to one day fall. And for some of them, their demise remains a mystery. What can we discover from clues left behind by them?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: Tokyo Legacy
programme.desc: The history of Tokyo, from its devastated state in the aftermath of WWII, rapid development leading to the 1964 Olympics, and finally the global powerhouse on the road to the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: After surviving the Heavenly Lightning Strike, the souls of Ne Zha and Ao Bing persist, but their mortal forms lie in ruins. Master Tai Yi seeks to restore them using the Seven-Colored Lotus, yet countless perils loom over the process. As enemies close in and fate hangs in the balance, can they reclaim their bodies and rewrite their destiny?

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang’s masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: Clans of Intrigue
programme.desc: Heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, when Gong from the Holy Water Palace appears and accuses Chu of stealing the holy water from her Palace and using it for various murders. Chu denies, and is given a month to find the murderer or be killed by Gong. To prove his innocence, Chu decides to investigate the case…

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend’s grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Delightful Forest
programme.desc: The legendary hero Wu Sung is sent to a prison in Meng province after murdering his adulterous sister-in-law and her lover. While in prison, the officer Shih En spares Wu the humiliating baton punishment. Owing Shih a favour, Wu decides to help Shih get his restaurant back at all costs when it was forcefully taken over by a local thug.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Invincible Enforcer
programme.desc: A young man is at the wrong place at the wrong time. As he offends a police inspector, he is thrown into jail and even when released, the police goes after him until he has no choice but to become a real criminal. Only a kind and beautiful probation officer is on his side, but can she help him?

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Kuta Hanagasa Dance was added to the UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity list in 2023. Village men make flower lanterns for the summer ritual that has survived undisrupted for centuries.

programme.title: NewsRoom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk

programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to teach a class, Howard surprises everyone by taking it. Meanwhile, the tension between Penny and Bernadette gives Amy a chance to play both sides.

programme.title: Friends S7 5
programme.desc: Joey tries to teach Chandler how to smile for an engagement picture with Monica. Phoebe and Ross each date the members of a couple preparing for divorce. Joey takes Tag out for a good time.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 19
programme.desc: Hack Nanny returns with the best parenting tips and tricks, and Broke Ass Bob figures out how to hack his own day spa. Plus, Brooke hacks homemade pizza bites, and Kevin drinks juice without taking it out of the fridge.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 20
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin test their craziest hack yet: cooking a three-course meal under the hood of a car…while driving! Plus, Kevin finds out who can spot his fresh breath hack, and one family spends three months living in a Hack House.

programme.title: Smallville S2 4
programme.desc: When the school unwittingly uses red meteor rocks in its class rings, Clark experiences a new meteorite effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 15
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it, and at the AT&T store, Michael shows off a new way to lighten the load. Plus, a man can vanish into a manhole, but the whole hole can't vanish, right?!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 3
programme.desc: Howard's nervous when NASA asks him to throw out the first pitch at a game. Also, Leonard & Penny try to prove Sheldon wrong after he claims that he & Amy are a superior couple.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 8
programme.desc: Our buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits? Then, a dumpy unit sends almost everyone running, but Papa Bear spies a profit. And later, the day's final auction contains expensive looking sky-diving equipment that ignites a sky-high bidding war. But when the dust settles, the winner will unveil a hidden gem that spells a five-figure payday.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 08
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: The Incredible Burt Wonderstone
programme.desc: Superstar magicians Burt Wonderstone (Steve Carell) and Anton Marvelton (Steve Buscemi) have ruled the Las Vegas strip for years, raking in millions with illusions as big as Burt's growing ego. But lately the duo's greatest deception is their public friendship, while secretly they've grown to loathe each other. Facing cutthroat competition from guerilla street magician Steve Gray (Jim Carrey), whose cult following surges with each outrageous stunt, even their show looks stale. But there's still a chance Burt and Anton can save the act -- both onstage and off -- if Burt can get back in touch with what made him love magic in the first place.

programme.title: Vacation
programme.desc: The next generation of Griswolds is at it again! Ed Helms (The Hangover films) and Christina Applegate (Anchorman films) star in this hilarious sequel to one of the funniest comedies ever made.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 8
programme.desc: Our buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits? Then, a dumpy unit sends almost everyone running, but Papa Bear spies a profit. And later, the day's final auction contains expensive looking sky-diving equipment that ignites a sky-high bidding war. But when the dust settles, the winner will unveil a hidden gem that spells a five-figure payday.

programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it, and at the AT&T store, Michael shows off a new way to lighten the load. Plus, a man can vanish into a manhole, but the whole hole can't vanish, right?!

programme.title: Focus

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: After suffering traumatic losses, Linda's life took a drastic turn. Now, at 70, her once-elegant lifestyle has evolved into an existence surrounded by trash and decay.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: The Mafia's Manager
programme.desc: Taiwanese police received a tip off that a mysterious manager in the Taiwanese mafia was getting on a flight to Jakarta. They had just 6 hours to identify him to their counterparts in Jakarta.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.desc: Det. Walter Edmond responds to a homicide where a woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds, and a couple at the scene leads him to a suspect.

programme.desc: A 68-year-old father shoots his daughter's boyfriend when the couple arrives at the family home. Believing his daughter is trapped in an abusive relationship, he fires three shots.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner’s doorstep; a jeweller locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive.

programme.title: La Photographe
programme.desc: France, 1936. The German photojournalist Gerta Pohorylle and her partner, the Hungarian photographer Andre Friedmann, had a hard time getting published in the press. When the Spanish Civil War broke out, they were determined to cover the events, under the names of Gerda Taro and Robert Capa.

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: Eileen Muza is the sole resident of a ghost town called Cisco in the middle of the desert in Utah called Cisco. Since 2015, she has been renovating the abandoned shacks and salvaging materials to transform them into artists' residences. In this lost space, Eileen has finally found inner peace.

programme.desc: At the Grand Parc orchard, customers are invited to pick their own fruits and vegetables. On their dairy farm, two brothers have set themselves the challenge of producing better while reducing their CO2 emissions. All about the largest mammal living in Normandy: the deer.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: La Vie A Velo
programme.desc: Throughout France, more than twenty million people use bicycles daily. Marion Rousse, a champion road cyclist, meets those for whom this means of transportation has become essential in their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: La Cuisine D'Isabelle Et Ricardo
programme.desc: The chef highlights bell peppers with a hot dish and a salad: stuffed shells with cottage cheese and spinach in roasted pepper sauce, and a preparation with grilled peppers and zucchini.

programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: La Cuisine D'Isabelle Et Ricardo
programme.desc: The chef highlights bell peppers with a hot dish and a salad: stuffed shells with cottage cheese and spinach in roasted pepper sauce, and a preparation with grilled peppers and zucchini.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: La Vie A Velo
programme.desc: Throughout France, more than twenty million people use bicycles daily. Marion Rousse, a champion road cyclist, meets those for whom this means of transportation has become essential in their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: At the Grand Parc orchard, customers are invited to pick their own fruits and vegetables. On their dairy farm, two brothers have set themselves the challenge of producing better while reducing their CO2 emissions. All about the largest mammal living in Normandy: the deer.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: With a predilection for bringing life back to dormant fashion houses, and an unfailing love of elegance: Guillaume Henry presents his autumn-winter 2024/2025 collection for Patou.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Silence, ca Pousse !
programme.desc: Contents: Anaelle Thery, former nurserywoman turned specialist in syntropic agriculture; duckweed; the Paris Zoological Park; Don't panic: back with Philippe.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a disused hangar, the whole Jewish Orthodox community of Strasbourg is plunged into mourning. The police asks: Anti-Semitic crime or murder committed by someone close to the victim? Wagner dives into this sensitive investigation.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: The House of Christian Dior launches its 4th Women at Dior mentoring programme. All you ever wanted to know about the origins of the saying ''Rendez-vous A Midi Petante'' (rendezvous bang on midday). Rouvenat: the renaissance of a great name in French jewellery. How to associate burgundy in men's fashion.

programme.title: JCVD
programme.desc: Fed up with American celebrity, actor Jean-Claude Van Damme returns to Belgium. He leaves behind his tax and marital problems and longs for a new tranquillity. While he is in a post office, an unexpected event thrusts him, despite himself, back into the spotlight.

programme.title: Les Fleurs Sauvages
programme.desc: Over a phone message, a man explains how to use his tractor so that the person on the other end can mow the lawn in his garden in his absence.

programme.title: La Photographe
programme.desc: France, 1936. The German photojournalist Gerta Pohorylle and her partner, the Hungarian photographer Andre Friedmann, had a hard time getting published in the press. When the Spanish Civil War broke out, they were determined to cover the events, under the names of Gerda Taro and Robert Capa.

programme.title: Mes Amis Espagnols
programme.desc: Born in Switzerland in the 1980s, partners in everyday life and football brothers, the friends of filmmaker Adrien Bordone migrated to their parents' country during adolescence. What kind of adults have they become? How did they experience this forced return migration? Camera in hand, Adrien goes to meet them.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Born in Sarajevo and arriving in Quebec as a child, Jelena fled the war in former Yugoslavia with her parents. Today an actress trained at the Conservatoire d'art dramatique de Quebec, she moves between stage, screen and artistic engagement, driven by a deeply multicultural journey.
